subcodes.first_line: This is a Book from this Wronged One, the Prisoner and the Grief-Stricken, unto him who hath believed in God and chosen [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب من لدن هذا المسجون المظلوم المحزون الی الذی آمن بالله و اتخذ
subcodes.subjects: @transcending the material condition, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @consolation and comfort, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
